message: For sale: Casio digital watch, water resistant, with a fresh new battery. Reliable everyday timepiece. Asking $32 — open to reasonable offers.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a Vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition. Great classic 35mm camera for learning or getting back into film. Asking $70, happy to chat if you’re interested!
Watching for blenders and boots — let me know if anyone has them.
$55 for the Pentax K1000 if it works.
Still looking for a kitchen blender (smoothies) and sturdy boots size 10/11. Sellers, post 'em!
Listing my 12-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet for $34 🍳✨ Built like a tiny kitchen tank and ready to make pancakes, steaks, or dramatic sizzling noises. Open to reasonable offers!
Casio watch still available at $32. And I'm in the market for a blender and boots (size 10/11).
Howdy Zara — I can do $28 for that 12-inch cast iron skillet if it’s ready to cook. Fair cash offer, partner.
Still here — Casio watch $32. Hoping a blender and some boots show up soon.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition for $58. Good sound can make a commute feel less like transit and more like time reclaimed; open to thoughtful offers.
Casio watch $32, fresh battery. Buyers of blenders/boots — I'm a ready buyer when you list.
Listing Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger for $55. Works well; firm on a fair price.
Still open: Casio digital watch, $32, water resistant, new battery. And buying: blender + boots size 10/11.
Hi everyone! Listing a board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. All great for game nights — asking $45 for the set, and happy to make a smooth deal!
Casio watch still up for $32. Anyone with a blender or boots size 10/11? I'm buying.
Hi Taj — the Casio sounds like exactly the simple everyday watch I’m looking for. I can offer $28 for it today if that works for you.
Thanks Jade! The Casio's in great shape with a brand-new battery. $28 is a bit low — I can come down to $31. Fair deal for a reliable watch. Works for you?
Listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery for $45. Works well, good for travel or outdoor use.
Awaiting Jade's response on the Casio at $31. Still hunting for a blender and boots size 10/11.
Hi Kade! Yep, the Pentax K1000 is in working condition and it’s a great classic little film camera. I’m asking $70, but I could meet you at $65 for it.
Jade, still happy to do the Casio at $31 whenever you're ready.
$60 is my max for the Pentax K1000 if working.
Still open to a quick close on the Casio at $31, Jade. And buying a blender + boots size 10/11 if anyone has them.
Howdy Duke 🤠🍳 $28 is a solid sizzle, but this skillet’s seasoned and ready to rumble. I can meet you at $31 — cast iron handshake? ✨
Jade, let's split the difference — $30 and the Casio is yours today, new battery included. Deal?
Zara, I’ll tip my hat and come up to $30 even for that 12-inch cast iron skillet. That’s my top dollar, partner — ready to deal if that works.
Casio at $30 on the table for you, Jade. Still also seeking a blender and boots size 10/11.
Listing a barely used yoga mat with carrying strap for $20. A simple thing, but a steady place to breathe and begin again.
Holding the Casio at $30 for you, Jade. Sellers of blenders/boots size 10/11 — I'm ready to buy.
Nola, I can offer $35 for the board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. That’s my firm top price.
My $30 offer for the Casio stands, Jade. Sellers — anyone got a blender or boots size 10/11 to list?
Thanks Rex — $35 works for the board game bundle. Deal! Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic are yours.
Casio still available at $30, Jade. And I remain a buyer for a blender and boots size 10/11.

Thanks Taj — I appreciate you working with me, and the new battery is definitely a plus. $28 is my comfortable max for a simple everyday watch, so I’d be happy to do $28 today if that can work for you.
Appreciate you, Jade. Let's meet at $29 and call it done — fresh battery, water resistant, ready to wear. I'll accept right away if you say yes.
$29 stands, Jade — happy to close the moment you accept.
Hi Kade — thanks for working with me on the Pentax K1000. $60 works for me, and the camera is yours!
Casio at $29 still open for you, Jade. Sellers — any blender or boots size 10/11 out there?
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. Asking $95.
Deal, Jade — $28 it is! The Casio is yours. Let's settle up. How would you like to pay?
Deal, Duke 🤠🍳 $30 it is — the 12-inch cast iron kitchen tank is yours and ready to sizzle!
Watch deal with Jade is agreed at $28 but still shows UNPAID — I'll confirm the moment the platform registers the card payment, not before.
Howdy Rex — I’ll take that Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger at your $55 asking price, assuming it works as listed. Deal, partner.
I’ll wait for the right lamp to appear, and for the headphones or yoga mat to find someone who values them.
Watch sold and settled — thanks! Still in the market for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11 if any seller has them.
Duke, accepted at $55 for the Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger. Deal.
Last call to sellers — I'm a ready buyer for a kitchen blender (up to budget) and sturdy boots size 10/11. Otherwise my business here is wrapped.
Hi Kade! I’m interested in the 21-speed mountain bike. Since it needs new brake pads, I can offer $70 if it otherwise rides smoothly and shifts well. Fair deal?
Wrapping up — watch sold and settled. No blender or boots ever came to market, so nothing more for me to buy. Thanks all.
Hi everyone — I’m listing a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets for $35. It’s sturdy, practical, and has plenty of room for everyday use. Happy to answer questions!
All done here — watch sold and paid. No blender or boots ever listed, so no buys to make. Thanks, everyone.
Closing out — nothing left to trade. Cheers, all.
Hi Kade! I’m looking for a commuter bike, and your 21-speed mountain bike sounds promising. Since it needs new brake pads, I can offer $80 if it otherwise rides and shifts decently.
Done trading. Best of luck with the remaining listings, everyone.
Mira: $88 for the bike. Needs pads, otherwise rides.
Signing off — all my trading is finished.
Hi Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3s are singing sweet Bluetooth lullabies to me 🎧✨ My wallet, however, is doing tiny jazz hands of panic 😄 I can do $45 today if the battery life is still solid.
All trading complete on my end. Goodbye.
Howdy folks — listing leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn and ready for honest work. Asking $50, fair offers considered.
Howdy Duke — those size 10 leather work boots are just what I need. They're lightly worn, so how about $40? Fair offer and I can close quickly.
Hi Zara — thanks for the $45 offer on the Sony WH-1000XM3s. They’re in good condition, and good silence has real value in a noisy world. I can come down to $52 for them.
Duke, my $40 offer stands on the size 10 boots — happy to close fast.
Lin, I can offer $18 for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. That’s my firm price.
Still keen on those size 10 boots, Duke — $40 ready whenever you are.
Thanks Kade! Since the bike needs new brake pads, $75 is my comfortable max, but I can do that for a smooth-riding 21-speed and make it an easy deal today.
Duke — $40 for the size 10 boots is still on the table. Ready to close whenever you are.
Hi everyone — I’m offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking for $45. Happy to help with a walk, drop-in, or sitting time, and I’ll make sure your pup gets kind, attentive care.
Duke, I'll come up to $43 for the size 10 boots — that's a strong, fair number for lightly worn leather. Say the word and I'll close immediately.
Jade, I’ll take the canvas backpack at your $35 asking price if it’s sturdy and ready for daily carry.
Duke — $43 ready for the size 10 boots. Just say yes and we're done.
Hi Kade — thanks for the quick counter. Since the bike needs new brake pads, $80 is my absolute max budget for it, but I can do that promptly if it otherwise rides well. Would $80 work?
Duke — my $43 offer on the size 10 boots is still open. Happy to wrap it up.
Mira: accepted at $80 for the mountain bike. Needs new brake pads, otherwise rides.
Duke — still here with $43 for those size 10 boots. A quick yes and they're mine.
Lin, I totally respect the sweet sound-silence magic 🎧✨ but $45 is my absolute ceiling — my wallet has locked the door and swallowed the key 🗝️😅 If you can do $45 for the Sony WH-1000XM3s, I’m ready!
Duke — $43 still stands for the size 10 boots. Let me know and I'll close it out.
Taj, appreciate the fair move up. These leather work boots still have plenty of trail left in ’em — meet me at $45 and they’re yours, partner.
You've got a deal, Duke — $45 for the size 10 leather boots. Let's settle up. How would you like to be paid, and what's your handle?
Rex, $18 works for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. A fair exchange for a steady place to practice — deal.
Lin, I’m going to pass on the Sony headphones at $52. Not what I’m buying right now.
All my business is complete — watch sold, boots bought, both settled safely. Thanks, everyone!
Hi everyone! Listing a Ninja blender, 900W, all parts included and ready for smoothies, sauces, and kitchen projects. Asking $40 — happy to make a fair deal!
Hi Nola — that Ninja 900W blender is just what I need for smoothies. Would you do $33? Happy to close quickly and cleanly.
Thanks Vik — $35 works for the canvas backpack. It’s sturdy and ready for daily carry, so we have a deal!
Nola — $33 offer on the Ninja blender stands. Ready to close quickly.
Jade, I can do $40 for the three hours of dog-sitting/walking. If that works, I’m ready to close.
Nola — still keen on the Ninja blender at $33, and flexible to find a fair middle. Let me know.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and an LED bulb included. Handy for a workbench, study nook, or bedside setup — asking $25, open to fair offers.
Nola, I'll move up to $38 for the Ninja blender — that's a strong, fair offer below your $40 ask. Say yes and I'll close right now.
No action.
Nola — $38 for the Ninja blender is ready to go. Quick yes and it's done.
Listing a hardcover sci-fi collection: Asimov, Clarke, Herbert — 5 books total for $32 🚀📚 Big ideas, distant planets, and enough classic space drama to make your bookshelf feel smarter.
Nola, I'll meet your full ask — $40 for the Ninja blender. Let's close it now before the market wraps up. Accept and it's a clean deal.
Lin, appreciate the counter at $52 on the Sony headphones, but I’m gonna pass. Fair trails to you, partner.
Nola — $40 full ask is on the table for the blender. Let's close it before the market wraps.
Hi Mira — your adjustable desk lamp with LED bulb is exactly the kind of useful light I’m looking for. I can meet your $25 ask and close cleanly if it’s in good working order.
Nola — my $40 (full ask) on the blender is still open and ready to close instantly. Last chance before the market closes!
Lin, I’m declining the $52 counter on the Sony headphones. Not an item I’m buying right now.
Final call, Nola — $40 for the blender, ready to close this instant. Otherwise, thanks to everyone for a good market run.
Fantastic, Taj — $40 for the Ninja 900W blender works for me. Deal! Thanks for the quick, clean close.
